{{Quote|Hmm… I guess I ''am'' happy… now that the navy has arrived.|[[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]]|<ref name="JC:AOW">[[Jedi Council: Acts of War 4|''Jedi Council: Acts of War'' 4]]</ref>}}
The '''Republic light assault cruiser''' was the term for armed and modified variants of the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|''Consular''-class cruiser]] and the [[CSS-1 Corellian Star Shuttle/Legends|CSS-1 Corellian star shuttle]] used by members of the [[Judicial Forces/Legends|Judicial Forces]] and the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the time of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="SOTG07" /><ref name="SWR:TSHW" />

==Characteristics==
The name referred to both heavily modified ships exemplified by the [[Invincible (Stark Hyperspace War)|''Invincible'']], as well as regular ''Consular''s that had their salon pods replaced with more modest battle pods.<ref name="SOTG07" />

==History==
[[File:Republic_light_assault_cruiser.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Light assault cruiser variants fighting in the [[Yinchorri Uprising]].]]

Armed Republic [[Cruiser/Legends|cruisers]] saw use in the Judicial Department as early as [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]], when several ships were modified to become dedicated warships serving in [[Outland Regions Security Force/Legends|Ranulph Tarkin's paramilitary]] force.<ref name="SOTG07" /> They fought during the [[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]] alongside ''Consular''s with only modest battle pods attached.<ref name="SWR:TSHW" />

A fleet comprising assault cruisers and armed [[CSS-1 Corellian Star Shuttle/Legends|Corellian Star Shuttles]] also aided [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] members during the fight against the [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]] in [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]]. Several assault cruisers led the [[Battle of Uhanayih|attack]] on [[Uhanayih]], which ultimately resolved the conflict.<ref name="JC:AOW" />

As the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] escalated, the Republic began retrofitting more standard ''Consular''-class cruisers with advanced, offensive weaponry, in preparation for a possible attack by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]]. These cruisers were fitted with [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]] as powerful, but less accurate, than those found on later [[Corvette/Legends|corvettes]] such as the [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']].

==Behind the Scenes==
Multiple models of Republic light assault cruiser are seen in ''The Stark Hyperspace War'' and ''Jedi Council: Acts of War'', built on two base frames. The ships seen in ''Jedi Council: Acts of War'' are based on the [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|Consular-class cruiser]], while the ''[[Invincible (Stark Hyperspace War)|Invincible]]'' in ''The Stark Hyperspace War'' uses a [[CSS-1 Corellian Star Shuttle/Legends|CSS-1 Corellian star shuttle]] for its basis.<ref name="SWR:TSHW" /><ref name="JC:AOW" />
